zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord James Calthorpe於大約1506年出生在英國諾福爾可考可索普時，他的父親Christopher Calthorpe45歲，母親Alianore Bernard33歲。他於1528年6月14日與Elizabeth Garneys在英國英格蘭素福爾可簡頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1559年8月22日在英國諾福爾可享年54歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可考可索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord James Calthorpe于大约1506年出生在英国諾福爾可考可索普时，他的父亲Christopher Calthorpe45岁，母亲Alianore Bernard33岁。他于1528年6月14日与Elizabeth Garneys在英国英格兰素福爾可簡頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1559年8月22日在英国諾福爾可享年54岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可考可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Reduced form of Old Norse Þorfriðr, from Þórr ( see Tor ) + friðr ‘peace’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord James Calthorpe was born about 1506, in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Christopher Calthorpe, was 45 and his mother, Alianore Bernard, was 33. He married Elizabeth Garneys on 14 June 1528, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 August 1559, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord James Calthorpe est né environ 1506, à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Calthorpe, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alianore Bernard, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Garneys le 14 juin 1528, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 août 1559, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord James Calthorpe um 1506 in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Calthorpe 45 und seine Mutter Alianore Bernard 33. Er hat am 14. Juni 1528 in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Garneys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1559 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord James Calthorpe è nato il circa 1506 nel Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Christopher Calthorpe, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Alianore Bernard, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Garneys il 14 giugno 1528, nel Kenton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1559, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord James Calthorpeが約1506年にイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペで生まれた時，父Christopher Calthorpeは45歳，母Alianore Bernardは33歳であった。1528年6月14日にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントンでElizabeth Garneysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1559年8月22日にイギリスノーフォルクで54歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクコクソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord James Calthorpe(이)가 대략 1506년 영국 노르폴크 콕소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Calthorpe(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianore Bernard(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1528년 6월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄턴에서 Elizabeth Garneys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 8월 22일 영국 노르폴크에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 콕소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord James Calthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1506, em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Calthorpe, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alianore Bernard, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Garneys em 14 de junho de 1528, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1559, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord James Calthorpe родился около 1506 г. в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Calthorpe было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianore Bernard, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Garneys 14 июня 1528 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 августа 1559 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord James Calthorpe nació aproximadamente 1506, en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher Calthorpe, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alianore Bernard, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Garneys el 14 de junio de 1528, en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1559, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
